notes: This batch reopens results_ultra_big_ax012346.json as its own bounded result-only ultra family.
Source membership is bounded to the ultra-big result surface and does not merge in the prior ultra3 orphan or any earlier ultra-strip family.
possible_downstream_consequence_policy: possible downstream consequence only; no direct A2-1 or A1 promotion from this batch

comparison_anchors.relevance: Provides continuity from the prior ultra orphan pass and records the explicit decision to defer ultra-big next.
Shows this file was the final remaining result-only orphan in the closure audit.
Shows zero repo-held evidence-pack visibility for the current orphan.

runtime_expectations: The current surface stores one compact ultra macro result with axis0 parameter metadata, four axis0 trajectory branches, four topology4 branches, two sequences, eight seeds, axis0_cycles 128, axis0_trials 96, entangle_reps 2, num_states 65536, and lin_trials 4096.
The axis0 trajectory branch keeps Bell and Ginibre summaries for SEQ01 and SEQ02 under sign and entanglement-repeat labels.
The topology4 branch keeps EC/EO and adaptive/fixed summaries rather than raw channel grids.
After this batch, the residual result-only class is exhausted and the next remaining residual work begins at the diagnostic/proof strip.
failure_modes: Inventing a runner anchor that is not present.
Over-reading ent-repeat as a meaningful stored axis when ent0 and ent1 are invariant to machine precision.
Centering sign instead of the numerically larger sequence split.
Flattening topology4 into one homogeneous branch instead of preserving both adaptive-vs-fixed and EC-vs-EO seams.
Merging the current orphan back into ultra3 because both are ultra result-only surfaces.

sims_split_rule.notes: This batch remains inside the separate sims source class and does not mix with ordinary theory/doc extraction.
